title: poa × pawlowskii
intro: Poa × pawlowskii, also known as Pawlowsk's meadow-grass, is a hybrid grass species derived from the Poa pratensis and Poa alpina grasses. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its anthelmintic and expectorant effects, which help in treating parasitic worm infections and relieving respiratory issues. The health benefits of Poa × pawlowskii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
